briefdescription.para: This function Enables the Interrupts for the core instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon

detaileddescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the v_warp_init IP instance. The callback will be invoked when a frame done interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_warp_init IP instance
is the address of the callback function
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler

detaileddescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the v_warp_init core driver. It clears the pending interrupt and determines if the source is a frame done signal. If yes, it calls the registered callback function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance that just interrupted

simplesect.para: The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon
is the number of descriptors to be created

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if Descriptors created successfully XST_FAILURE if Descriptors creation failed

briefdescription.para: This function clears and de-allocates all the descriptors.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon

briefdescription.para: This function programs a descriptor with given configurations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon
is the descriptor number which to be configured
is the input configuration pointer which to be configured into the descriptor

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if programming descriptor is successful XST_FAILURE if input configurations are not valid.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the IP core with a selected descriptor configuration.

detaileddescription.para: /* This function starts the IP core with a selected descriptor configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon
is the descriptor number with which configurations the IP shall start

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if IP core start successful XST_FAILURE if selected descriptor number is not valid.

briefdescription.para: This function stops the core instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon
